facebook.caption:
This beach fixes everything.

Bãi Trường runs for miles along Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Soft sand, shallow water, and the kind of quiet that actually slows your brain down. 4.3 stars across 718 reviews and it still feels underrated in person.

No crowds fighting for sunbeds. No hard sell. Just Phu Quoc doing what it does best.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the water change color at Bãi Trường as the sun drops. Miles of shoreline. Zero hustle. This is the version of Phu Quoc people come back for. 4.3★, 718 reviews.
